message:
feat(raptorq): harden GF256 dual-kernel policy and extend test coverage

GF256 dual-kernel policy: clamp env-override values to catalog min/max
bounds so that operator-supplied thresholds cannot violate the tuned
window contract. Clarify doc comments to distinguish "env override was
requested" from "env override changed the value". Add comprehensive unit
tests verifying clamping at both bounds and no-op when within range.

Linear algebra: add explicit dimension-mismatch guard for row-addmul
operations to fail fast rather than silently corrupting output matrices.

Decision contract: extend test coverage for wavefront pipeline state
transitions and expected-loss evaluation.

Test log schema: add structured validation for raptorq perf test output
format to catch schema drift early.

Plan fixtures: refactor fixture generation to use deterministic seeds
and clarify the coupling between fixture parameters and the test log
schema expectations.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
